profile.introduction: Hello, I'm Ramon, a Brazilian frontend developer currently transitioning into the tech field, focusing on web development. I specialize in creating responsive and engaging user interfaces using HTML, CSS, SCSS style modules, JavaScript, React.js and Next.js
profile.passion: I'm passionate about building clean, accessible, and user-friendly digital experiences. As I grow in this field, I'm excited to collaborate, learn, and bring ideas to life through code.

about.title: About me
about.introduction: Hi, I'm Ramon — a Front-end Web Developer based in Minas Gerais, Brazil.
about.description: Currently transitioning into the tech industry after professional experience in other sectors. This shift reflects my commitment to continuous learning and my passion for web development. I completed a full frontend web development bootcamp, where I learned and applied core concepts of HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React. I also deepened my knowledge of SCSS and began exploring Next.js with guidance from my cousin, a mid-level frontend developer.

present.education: Currently, I am enrolled and studying for a technologist degree in Analysis and Systems Development at Centro Universitário Padre Anchieta, expected to graduate in 2027.
present.goals: My goal is to become a well-rounded developer by enhancing my skills and expanding my knowledge through new technologies and frameworks. I am committed to becoming a complete professional who can effectively contribute to projects and teams, and I'm open to opportunities that enable me to grow and apply my expertise in challenging environments.

about.closing: I'm eager to learn new technologies, collaborate with teams, and apply solid development principles. I'm currently seeking my first professional opportunity as a frontend developer, where I can contribute with dedication, grow alongside the team, and help turn ideas into high-quality digital solutions.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.description: 100% responsive portfolio created in Next.js and style modules .scss.

recipes.title: Recipes Website
recipes.description: This was a web project developed during the Web Frontend bootcamp at Campinho Digital. The goal was to create a themed recipe website to display dishes, using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and modular file organization.

reencontrow.title: Reencontrow Website
reencontrow.description: Project made in React.js, CSS, to practice using React.js.

ordemDeServico.title: Service Order
ordemDeServico.description: Freelance project, created in Next.js and style module .scss, using the react-signature-canvas library for handwritten signatures as requested. Service order created for the company where my mentor works.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.subtitle: Let's talk
contacts.description: If you're interested please contact me.
